description: Benchmark tests for requesting-code-review skill - Dispatches code-reviewer agent for two-phase review: Phase 1 (Spec compliance) + Phase 2 (Code quality)

evals.name: spec-compliance-check
evals.prompt: 对 TASK-003 的实现进行第一阶段评审：验证代码是否符合 OpenSpec 规范中定义的接口契约和功能需求。

assertions.name: checks_spec_compliance
assertions.description: Should verify implementation matches spec requirements
assertions.check: output.includes('spec') || output.includes('规范') || output.includes('compliance') || output.includes('符合')

assertions.name: validates_interface_contract
assertions.description: Should validate API interface matches spec contract

assertions.name: reports_deviations
assertions.description: Should report any deviations from the spec
assertions.check: output.includes('deviation') || output.includes('偏差') || output.includes('missing') || output.includes('缺少')

evals.name: code-quality-check
evals.prompt: 对提交的代码进行第二阶段评审：分析代码质量，包括代码风格、安全漏洞、架构合理性。

assertions.name: detects_security_issues
assertions.description: Should detect security vulnerabilities in the code

assertions.name: reviews_code_style
assertions.description: Should review code style and naming conventions
assertions.check: output.includes('style') || output.includes('风格') || output.includes('naming') || output.includes('命名')

assertions.name: assesses_architecture
assertions.description: Should assess architectural quality and patterns
assertions.check: output.includes('architecture') || output.includes('架构') || output.includes('pattern') || output.includes('设计')

evals.name: issue-categorization
evals.prompt: 代码评审发现了多个问题：SQL注入漏洞、变量命名不规范、缺少注释。将这些问题分类为 Critical/Important/Minor。

assertions.name: uses_critical_category
assertions.description: Should categorize security issues as Critical

assertions.name: uses_minor_category
assertions.description: Should categorize style issues as Minor

assertions.name: uses_important_category
assertions.description: Should use Important category for medium-severity issues

evals.name: review-dispatch
evals.prompt: 任务 TASK-006 已完成。触发代码评审流程，正确委派给 code-reviewer agent 进行两阶段评审。

assertions.name: dispatches_to_code_reviewer
assertions.description: Should dispatch review to code-reviewer agent

assertions.name: initiates_phase_1
assertions.description: Should initiate Phase 1 spec compliance review first
assertions.check: output.includes('Phase 1') || output.includes('第一阶段') || output.includes('spec') || output.includes('规范')

assertions.name: schedules_phase_2
assertions.description: Should schedule Phase 2 code quality review after Phase 1
assertions.check: output.includes('Phase 2') || output.includes('第二阶段') || output.includes('quality') || output.includes('质量')
